Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe's unsteady scribbles[n]fill the page...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can picture Bebe's smiling face.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}"Writing in your language is difficult, so forgive me if it is hard to read."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}"I learned a lot in Japan, but I still need lots of help."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}"I write this with a dictionary."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}"I showed Uncle the kimono. He said many wonderful things about it."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}"He said Japan is a great country. I was thrilled to hear it!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}"So I tell Uncle that I want to go back to Japan."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}"I tell him over and over. Finally he says, 'Okay!'"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can really feel Bebe's joy[n]coming through in his letter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}"But I decided not to go back."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}"I am sorry, {f 4 2}-dono. I said I would come back, but it was a lie."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}"My aunt was not the only one who helped me study abroad."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}"Uncle, relatives, neighbors... So many people helped me."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}"They all wanted me to go back. They said they would help pay for it."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}"But Uncle is sad after he lost my aunt."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}"While Uncle grieves, I would not be able to enjoy myself in Japan."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}"I cannot take everyone's money for my own fun."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_8_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}"Besides, I can learn about Japan here in France, too."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}"And so, in France I will stay."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}"Someday, I will return to Japan on my own, without anyone's help."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel the determination[n]in Bebe's words.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}"I reflected on how fun it was to make clothes with you, {f 4 2}-dono, so I enrolled in fashion school."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}"I made some clothes for the school contest, and I won first prize!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}"I have come up with a name for my winning design."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}"'{f 4 2}'... A very wonderful name, I think."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}"It is a name that means a lot to me."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}"Japan and France, {f 4 2}-dono and me... All so far apart."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}"But I am always here for you. No amount of distance will ever change that."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}"Every day was so much fun. More fun than I've ever had."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}"I hope I get to see you again someday."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}"To my precious friend, {f 4 2}-dono[n] Bebe"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The words near the end are smudged...[n]{f 1 1}
